segments.narrative: Desde el inicio de los tiempos, nos ha observado en silencio.
segments.visual_prompt: Extreme wide shot of a silhouetted ancient megalithic structure (e.g., Stonehenge) against a vast, bright full moon in a star-speckled dark blue night sky, cinematic, high contrast, mystical atmosphere, 8k, photorealistic.

segments.narrative: Una esfera plateada, majestuosa y eternamente enigmática.
segments.visual_prompt: Ultra close-up, slow zoom-out from the highly detailed, rugged lunar surface, showing craters and valleys under a harsh, direct overhead sunlight, revealing a stark, desolate beauty, photorealistic, 8k, documentary style.

segments.narrative: Pero no siempre estuvo ahí. No nació con la Tierra.
segments.visual_prompt: Dramatic CGI simulation still: A young, proto-Earth, glowing red-orange, being struck by a colossal, molten impactor (Theia) with debris exploding outwards into space, fiery, high energy, scientifically accurate, epic scale, 8k.

segments.narrative: Nació de un cataclismo cósmico, una colisión brutal hace eones.
segments.visual_prompt: Artistic rendering: A swirling disc of incandescent debris, dust, and molten rock slowly coalescing in the nascent solar system, forming a proto-moon, ethereal light, cosmic dust, visionary, 4k, digital painting style.

segments.narrative: Su constante danza gravitacional con nuestro planeta...
segments.visual_prompt: Time-lapse artistic rendering: A calm ocean shoreline, showing the water visibly receding and then advancing over several hours, represented by subtle changes in the water line, with a visible moon high in the sky, serene, educational, illustrative, 4k.

segments.narrative: Dicta las poderosas mareas oceánicas que moldean costas.
segments.visual_prompt: Close-up of powerful ocean waves crashing against jagged rocks during high tide, sea foam flying, dramatic lighting from an overcast sky, dynamic, raw power, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Un motor silencioso de la vida terrestre.
segments.visual_prompt: Underwater wide shot: A vibrant coral reef teeming with diverse marine life (colorful fish, swaying anemones), illuminated by dappled sunlight filtering from the surface, showcasing the health of a tide-influenced ecosystem, serene, abundant, 4k, nature documentary style.

segments.narrative: Para los antiguos, era una deidad, un faro de creencias.
segments.visual_prompt: Ancient Egyptian papyrus scroll fragment showing the goddess Isis or Thoth associated with the moon, depicted in intricate hieroglyphs and stylized figures, aged texture, historical, cultural artifact style, close-up.

segments.narrative: Espejo de sueños, miedos, locura y el lado oculto del ser.
segments.visual_prompt: Stylized painting in the vein of a romantic era artwork: A lone, cloaked figure gazing up at a large, luminous full moon over a moody, dark, swirling forest, evoking wonder and slight apprehension, dreamlike, atmospheric, high detail.

segments.narrative: Inspiración de mitos y leyendas a través de los siglos.
segments.visual_prompt: Detailed illustration of a medieval-style werewolf mid-transformation, with glowing eyes and growing fangs, howling at a bright full moon in a dense, dark forest, gothic, dramatic shadows, fantastical, high detail.

segments.narrative: El hombre miró hacia ella, con un anhelo inquebrantable.
segments.visual_prompt: Archival black and white footage style: A group of people in the 1960s, dressed in period clothing, gathered around a small television set, captivated, watching a fuzzy broadcast of a rocket launch, nostalgic, film grain.

segments.narrative: Y en 1969, el sueño se hizo realidad.
segments.visual_prompt: Iconic low-angle shot of the Apollo 11 Saturn V rocket launching, plumes of smoke and fire engulfing the launchpad, immense power, historical, photorealistic recreation, 8k, cinematic.

segments.narrative: Un pequeño paso para un hombre, un salto gigantesco para la humanidad.
segments.visual_prompt: Wide shot from a slight low angle: Neil Armstrong's bootprint clearly visible in the fine lunar dust, with the lunar module in the background under a pitch-black sky, iconic, stark, historical, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Conquistamos su superficie, pero no su misterio total.
segments.visual_prompt: Astronaut in a full spacesuit, viewed from behind, standing triumphantly on the lunar surface, planting an American flag, with Earth visible as a vibrant blue marble in the distance, majestic, panoramic, aspirational, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Hoy, la estudiamos con tecnología, planeando nuevas misiones.
segments.visual_prompt: Close-up of a modern, high-tech lunar rover's wheel leaving precise tracks on a simulated moon dust surface inside a brightly lit, clean research lab, showcasing contemporary scientific exploration, futuristic, detailed, photorealistic.

segments.narrative: Su belleza, influencia y enigma perduran por siempre.
segments.visual_prompt: Ethereal shot of a shimmering, transparent full moon partially obscured by wispy, slow-moving clouds, casting a soft, diffuse light over a tranquil, dark landscape, evoking a sense of enduring wonder and mystery, artistic, contemplative, 4k.

segments.narrative: Nuestro confidente cósmico, nuestro eterno vigilante.
segments.visual_prompt: Slow, cinematic pan across a tranquil night sky filled with countless, sparkling stars, focusing on the moon as the brightest, most constant celestial body, its gentle light illuminating distant silhouetted mountains, majestic, awe-inspiring, 8k.

Final fade to black, with a single, perfectly round, softly glowing full moon appearing in the center of the frame, slowly shrinking to a dot, leaving a lingering impression of its singular beauty. Minimalist, powerful, 8k.
